case_title: LAI, HILDA Y. vs. GRADY, KATHERINE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, HILDA Y. AS TO DEFENDANT GRADY, KATHERINE PERRIN, ERIC DOES I TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT GRADY, KATHERINE PERRIN, ERIC ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT GRADY, KATHERINE PERRIN, ERIC ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GRADY, KATHERINE PERRIN, ERIC
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT GRADY, KATHERINE PERRIN, ERIC

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, HILDA Y. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-06-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-12-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, SETTLED AT SETT. CONF.

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY FILED BY PLAINTIFF. JOHN HURABIELL APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED. ROBERT IMBER, PRO TEM. JOHN LEWIS, REPORTER. STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AT 493 HAIGHT STREET. STAY JUDGMENT TO 8/1/93 PROVIDED DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH CONDITIONS OF STIPULATION RECORDED IN THE COURT RECORD. SEE COURT MINUTES FOR DETAILS.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: HURABIELL, JOHN PHILIP SUBSTITUTED FOR MACDONALD, STEVEN ADAIR AS ATTORNEY FOR LAI, HILDA Y.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRADY, KATHERINE PERRIN, ERIC PLAINTIFF TO HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANTS KATHERINE GRADY AND ERIC PERRIN FOR THE IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE AT 494 HAIGHT STREET APT. #3 S.F. CA. AND THE LEASE BY WHICH DEFENDANTS HOLD POSSESSION IS CANCELLED; ENFORCEMENT OF PLTF'S RIGHT TO POSSESSION STAYED UNTIL 8/1/93 UPON PAYMENT OF $650.00 BY DEFENDANTS TO PLAINTIFF OR PLTF'S ATTORNEY NOT LATER THAN 7/15/93. DEFENDANTS SHALL FURTHER PAY $1,625.00 WITH INTEREST AT 7% PER ANNUM FROM 7/1/93 FORWARD; DEFENDANTS TO MAKE PAYMENTS OF $200.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING 8/1/93 WITH PAYMENTS TO BE APPLIED FIRST TO INTEREST AND THEN TO PRINCIPAL UNTIL THE FULL SUM IS PAID. PLTF. TO CREDIT THE RENT DEPOSIT RECEIVED AGAINST THE TOTAL DUE; PLTF. SHALL ALSO CREDIT $325.00 AGAINST THE TOTAL OWING UPON PROOF FROM DEFENDANTS THAT 1/93 RENT OF $650.00 WAS PAID. PLAINTIFF WAIVES COST AND ATTORNEY FEES IF DEFENDANTS COMPLY FULLY WITH THE JUDGMENT OF THIS COURT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
